subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! Zanjan is called Khamsih (five), which number is blessed, being that of the Báb, meaning the Luminary of guidance and glad-tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان الهی زنجان را خمسه گویند این عدد مبارک باب است یعنی پرتو هدایت مبشر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @stories; anecdotes
